payload.answer: I can’t commit “everything about AI” as a durable memory because it is too broad and not specific to you. I can remember a narrower, actionable fact such as your interest in AI, your AI-related goals, preferred AI tools, or topics you want tracked.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is an overly broad instruction to remember an entire topic, not a specific durable personal fact, preference, goal, relationship, or context item.

details: The request was rejected because it is too broad for durable personal memory.

repair_options: Remember that I am interested in AI.
Remember that I want to learn about generative AI.
Remember that I work on AI-related projects.
Remember that I prefer concise explanations about AI topics.
Remember that I am researching AI safety.
